name: Rearrange items in a keyed v-for (pricing cards)
notes: Pricing cards use v-for :key=plan.id (PricingCards.vue). The guidance suggested keyed reordering would be graceful — that holds for POST-MOUNT re-renders against changed data, but does not hold for HYDRATION. Empirical observation: Vue's hydrator reconciles the keyed v-for back to the rendered template's array order regardless of the SSR'd DOM order. So edge-applied structural reorder is recovered even with keys. Reinforcement re-applies post-hydration.
